title: Settings
subtitle: Customize TimeLens to your liking

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.excludeTimelensHint: Hide TimeLens own usage from screen-time records
tracking.ignoreSystemProcessesHint: Exclude non-interactive System32/SysWOW64 processes (keep explorer/taskmgr and other interactive apps)
tracking.trackWindowTitlesHint: Record window title granularity (for example VS Code projects or browser tabs)
tracking.idleTimePolicyHint: Choose whether idle time is counted into totals or excluded

startup.title: Startup
startup.silentHint: Only applies when launched by OS startup

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.fadeHint: Widget becomes nearly transparent when covered; click to restore

browser.title: Browser Extension
browser.hint: Install the browser-extension folder as an unpacked extension in a Chromium browser. The extension reads desktop status and writes tab sessions back to TimeLens.

data.title: Data
data.noExcludedApps: No apps excluded yet — pick an app above to add it

about.title: About
about.upToDate: You are on the latest version

addLanguageHint: To add a new language, see docs/ADD_LANGUAGE.md
